# Math Utilities

Description of the math utilities.

## Import

```js
import { math } from '@webalternatif/js-core'
```

---

## round

[src/math.js:16-18][1]

### Parameters

*   `val` &#x20;
*   `precision`   (optional, default `0`)

## round

[src/math.js:16-18][1]

Rounds to the nearest multiple of the precision

### Parameters

*   `val` **[number][2]**&#x20;
*   `precision` **[number][2]**  (optional, default `0`)

Returns **[number][2]** The rounded value

## floorTo

[src/math.js:27-31][3]

Rounds down to the nearest multiple of the precision

### Parameters

*   `val` **[number][2]**&#x20;
*   `precision` **[number][2]**&#x20;

Returns **[number][2]** The rounded value

## dec2hex

[src/math.js:89-91][9]

Converts a decimal number into hexadecimal

### Parameters

*   `n` **[number][2]**&#x20;

Returns **[string][5]**&#x20;

## hex2dec

[src/math.js:99-117][10]

Converts a hexadecimal into a decimal number

### Parameters

*   `hex` **[string][5]**&#x20;

Returns **[number][2]**&#x20;
